name: @accesslint/audit-action
description: GitHub Action that audits a URL against WCAG 2.2 and emits JSON + Markdown reports.

scripts.build: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --external:playwright --external:@accesslint/core --sourcemap --legal-comments=external --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
